description: A Facilities Security Officer at a research lab needs you to manage physical building keys in Snipe-IT. Configure the system by creating custom fields 'Key Cut Code' and 'Access Zone' (Format: Any) within a new fieldset named 'Physical Security Keys', then assign this fieldset to the 'Building Keys' category. Process a lost key report for Dr. Sarah Harding (sharding) by updating the status of 'Zone B Master Key' (ASSET-KEY-004) to 'Lost/Stolen' with a note indicating it was reported lost. Issue a replacement key to Sarah Harding (sharding) using 'ASSET-KEY-009' (Spare Zone B Master Key), ensuring the custom fields are updated with Key Cut Code '77421' and Access Zone 'Zone B'. Finally, update the audit record for contractor Dennis Nedry (dnedry) by setting the 'Expected Checkin Date' for Visitor Badge 15 (ASSET-KEY-015) to '2026-05-01'.
